name: Branding Technology Inc.
summary: Branding Technology Inc. provides brand, digital marketing, and offshore related services in Japan. The company offers media production services, which include Web site creation and Web system construction, as well as recruitment site, curated site, LP banner, and flyer/brochure production services. It also provides brand, access analysis, SEO, marketing automation/customer relationship management, personnel system, and office environment consulting services; content marketing services; Internet advertising/SEO services; and operating media services for the dentistry, architecture, and real estate industries. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
